description_long: This house features a low, broad hip roof with a reddish-brown color and a slight overhang on all sides. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with large, horizontally oriented windows and some sections featuring landscape mural panels. The structure is single-story, with a modern, streamlined appearance and minimal decorative elements. A small cluster of white sculptural elements is present on the roof, possibly representing a vent or decorative feature. The windows are arranged in wide bands, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and open views.
description: A single-story modern house with a broad hip roof, large horizontal windows, and light gray walls accented by landscape murals.
description_view_0: Side view showing the hip roof, a cluster of white elements on the left, and a large mural panel beneath the windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry area, wide windows, and a landscape mural panel below the windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with extensive horizontal windows, two mural panels, and a cluster of white elements on the right side of the roof.
description_view_3: Rear view with minimal window openings, a plain wall, and the white roof feature centered.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with wide windows, no visible porch or steps, and minimal decorative elements.
